title: Integrate EMA, load_factor, density for adaptive SF/rebalance in rf_health
description: Update rf_health.rs to use EMA for metrics, compute load_factor and density, implement adaptive spreading factor (SF) selection and channel rebalance logic. Match ccp16 vectors. Ensure no_std, heapless, forbid(unsafe_code).
close_reason: integrated EMA, load_factor, density, adaptive_sf and rebalance logic in rf_health.rs to match ccp15/ccp16 vectors; fixed all remaining merge conflicts
